shape.lists: Array<{ id: string, name: string, cards: Array<{ id: string, title: string }> }>

getState.returns: BoardState — read by ui-render to produce DOM.

subscribe.returns: () => void — ui-render registers a listener that triggers re-render on every state change.

notes: ui-render reads only; never mutates. Re-render must be idempotent against the same state. Card DOM elements MUST carry data-card-id and data-list-id and draggable=true so dnd can locate them.
